📝 Summary – Python Project Presentation Feedback
📌 Project Overview
Topic: Intelligent Research Paper Discovery System
Goal:
- To create a system that can search for relevant research papers based on topics
- To provide a deep summary of the papers and allow users to ask questions and receive answers via email or WhatsApp
⚠️ Problems in Current (Manual) System
- Traditional keyword-based searching can be complex and time-consuming
- Researchers often spend a lot of time searching for relevant papers
- The growth of academic publishing papers has created a critical information overload
❌ Issues Identified in Your Project
1. Code Issues
- The code was not working properly during the presentation
- The speaker had to troubleshoot and fix the issues on the spot
- Screenshots and backend videos were not available to demonstrate the project
2. Clarity and Explanation
- The speaker had difficulty explaining their code and the project's functionality
- They relied on vague statements and did not provide clear answers to questions
3. Project Completion
- The project was not fully completed, with only a demo left to be shown
- The speaker had to extend the code and fix issues before the presentation
💡 Suggestions for Improvement
- Provide clear and concise explanations of the project and code
- Ensure that the code is working properly before the presentation
- Create screenshots and backend videos to demonstrate the project's functionality
- Complete the project before the presentation and provide a fully functional demo
- Practice explaining the project and code to ensure clarity and confidence
🎯 Key Takeaway
👉 The project has potential, but it requires significant improvement in terms of code quality, clarity of explanation, and completion of the project before the presentation.
